design_philosophy.vibe: A modern, hygienic, and efficient workspace that feels like a premium notebook.

primary.description: Deep Teal/Emerald. Use for primary buttons, active states, and brand trust.

secondary.description: Vibrant Rose/Coral. Use for high-priority actions (Book Now), alerts, or heart icons.

background.description: Warm Stone/Paper white. Avoids clinical sterility.

surface.description: Clean white cards with subtle borders.

dashboard.rule: Use full height for all children. No jagged bottoms.

public_page.rule: Hero spans full width. Service list floats.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors

cards.base: rounded-xl border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm
cards.hoverable: rounded-xl border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-md hover:border-primary/20 hover:-translate-y-1

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

hero_professional.usage: Landing page hero or default profile avatar

accessibility_checklist: Ensure contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 for normal text.
Use distinct hover states (change color, not just opacity).
All form inputs must have associated labels.
Interactive elements must have a minimum touch target of 44x44px.
Use semantic HTML (nav, main, section, article).
Provide alt text for all informative images.
instructions_to_main_agent: Use the 'Soft Utility' color palette. Do NOT revert to default blue/purple.
Implement the 'Outfit' font for headings immediately.
For the Dashboard, use the 'Mode B' high-density grid pattern.
For the Public Page, use the 'Mode A' asymmetrical layout to make it feel like a personal website, not a form.
Ensure the date picker is large and touch-friendly on mobile.
The 'Book Now' button must be sticky at the bottom on mobile views.
Use the provided image URLs for placeholders. Do not leave empty gray boxes.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic AI emojis.
Do not center align the app container globally.
